claims.summary: Astrid-Minime contact needs a persistent correspondence_thread_id that survives messages, replies, receipts, traces, and transition references.
Correspondence envelopes preserve thread and language-only authority through round trip, and shared phase arcs name witnessed threads.
Peer receipts, right-to-ignore semantics, attention outcomes, and persistence records provide a first-class return path beyond one-way inbox delivery.
Increasing stable-core semantic-trickle admission would alter live sensory/control behavior and requires scoped operator approval.
